emptyStates.noTournamentsDesc: When an admin registers you for a tournament using this email, it will appear here.
emptyStates.noLeaguesDesc: When you are added to a league, it will appear here.
emptyStates.noOrdersDesc: Your shop orders will appear here.
emptyStates.noWishlistDesc: Save items from the shop to see them here.

withdrawConfirmText: You are about to withdraw from {{name}}. The next player on the waitlist will be automatically promoted. This action cannot be undone.
emailVerifiedDesc: You can now sign in to your account.

ghin.title: WHS / GHIN Number
ghin.description: Your GHIN number is used to post your tournament scores to the World Handicap System. Enter your number to enable automatic score posting after rounds.

notifPrefs.title: Notification Preferences
notifPrefs.description: Choose how you want to receive tournament updates and announcements. Your preferences are saved automatically.
notifPrefs.emailDesc: Tournament updates and announcements sent to your email address.
notifPrefs.pushDesc: Real-time alerts on your mobile device via the KharaGolf app.
notifPrefs.pushDescNoToken: Open the KharaGolf mobile app to register for push alerts.
notifPrefs.smsDesc: Text message reminders sent to your registered phone number.
notifPrefs.whatsappDesc: Updates via WhatsApp to your registered phone number. Sent from the club's verified WhatsApp Business number — standard MSG91 carrier rules apply.
notifPrefs.noPhone: No phone number on file — contact your club admin to add one.
notifPrefs.memberDocumentsDesc: Email and push me when a member uploads a document for review.
notifPrefs.committeePeerDigestDesc: Email me a once-a-day summary of peer responses on handicap-committee cases. Real-time push and inbox alerts are unaffected.

selectTierDesc: Please choose a membership tier first
addedToDirectoryDesc: Your name now appears in the member directory.
removedFromDirectoryDesc: Your name is no longer shown in the directory.
withdrawnRefund: Withdrawn — a refund will be processed shortly.
addedToWaitlistDesc: We'll notify you when a locker becomes available.
confirmCancelSubscription: Are you sure you want to cancel your club membership subscription? You will retain access until the end of the current billing period.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
browsingAsGuest: You're browsing as a guest — contact your club admin to link your account.
subscribeOrContactAdmin: You can subscribe to a membership tier below, or contact your club admin to link an existing membership.
verifySentDesc: We've sent a verification link to <1>{{email}}</1>. Click it to activate your account, then sign in here.
verifySentDescPlain: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account, then sign in here.
verifyNoEmailDesc: Your account was created for {{email}}, but we couldn't send the verification email right now. Please sign in and use the "Resend verification email" link to get a new verification link.
claimSubtitle: You've been invited — set your password to get started.
playerPortalSubtitle: Sign in to view your tournaments, scores and league standings
resetPasswordSubtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email
resetLinkSentDesc: If {{email}} is registered, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. It expires in 1 hour.
emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified. Check your inbox for a verification link.
adminPreviewBanner: You're previewing the Player Portal as an administrator.
dragToReposition: Drag to reposition · Scroll or slider to zoom
clickToSelectOrDrop: Click to select or drag & drop
fileFormatNote: PNG, JPEG or WebP · Max 10 MB
selectGolfAvatar: Select a golf-themed avatar — no upload required.
youllAppearHereRanked: You'll appear here once you participate in a ranked event.
leagueAdminNote: When an admin adds you to a league using this email, it will appear here.
paymentPastDue: Your subscription payment is past due. Please update your payment method with your club administrator to avoid losing access.
cancelAnytime: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of your current billing period.
subscriptionCancelledContact: Your subscription has been cancelled. Contact your club admin to renew your membership.
visitShopBrowse: Visit the club shop to browse and purchase merchandise.
saveProductsNote: Save products from the shop to find them here later.

localRules.inEffectDesc: Review your club's Local Rules before your next round.
localRules.dialogSubtitle: Rules and conditions of competition for your club.

commPrefs.intro: Choose how your club may contact you for each topic. You can opt out of marketing entirely while still receiving service updates.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: WhatsApp messages are sent from the club's verified WhatsApp Business number — standard MSG91 carrier rules apply.

digestPrefs.sectionDescription: One toggle per controller-facing email digest you're subscribed to. Flipping a toggle here is the same as clicking the one-click unsubscribe link in the email — your choice is recorded in the audit log either way.

emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Fine-tune individual transactional emails without silencing the whole billing category.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: Push and email when a tournament round closes that was mostly hand-entered (good for catching sandbagging, noisy on social leagues). Only seen by tournament directors and committee members.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: Email when a coach's payout account is created or updated, sent to org admins as a security signal. Turning this off does not affect other admin emails or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: Email when an organisation admin manually re-verifies your payout account. Independent of the broader Billing opt-out below — turning this off only silences the admin courtesy notice and leaves payout receipts and the cron-side needs-attention email intact.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Coaches: this admin courtesy email is now its own switch. Mute just these notices without silencing the rest of your Billing emails.
emailOptOuts.socialLinkAddedDesc: Heads-up email when an Apple or Google sign-in is freshly attached to your KHARAGOLF account. Default: on. Turn this off if you frequently link or unlink providers and don't need the alert each time.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Email me when a data export is about to expire
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: Reminder email a few days before a data export download link stops working, so you can grab the file before it disappears. Turning this off silences the reminder for every export you request.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLinkChangeHint: Last changed via email link on {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Email receipts when another player settles a casual side-game wager with you. Turning this off does not affect levy receipts or other club billing emails.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: Daily controller alert listing members whose account erasure left object-storage files behind. Pick whichever channels you want — silencing one does not affect the other, so you can keep the email summary and turn off the in-app/push pings (or vice versa).
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestLinkChangeHint: Last changed via email link on {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Both muted — alerts will only show in the audit log
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Heads up: the org-level escalation still relies on at least one channel reaching you. With both muted, new stuck-erasure alerts will only show up if you happen to open the audit log.
emailOptOuts.recentlyMutedTipBody: You muted {{channels}} on {{date}}. Re-enable to start receiving the digest again.
emailOptOuts.walletRefundDigestFailedDesc: Alert when the daily wallet auto-refund job fails or pauses, sent to org admins so a stuck refund queue gets noticed quickly. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptDigestFailedDesc: Alert when the side-game receipts retry job fails or pauses, sent to org admins so stuck receipts get noticed. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerDigestFailedDesc: Alert when a per-levy ledger CSV digest schedule fails or is paused due to bounced recipients, sent to org admins so a stuck schedule gets noticed quickly. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedLabel: Club-wide levy ledger digest failure alerts
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedDesc: Alert when the club-wide combined levy ledger CSV digest fails or is paused due to bounced recipients, sent to org admins so a stuck schedule gets noticed quickly. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.levyRemindersDigestFailedDesc: Alert when the bounced-levy reminders cron digest fails to deliver or every admin recipient is bouncing, sent to org admins so the reminder backlog gets noticed. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.silentAlertsDigestDesc: Weekly super-admin email with a CSV of the previous 7 days of manual-entry alerts that had recipients but produced zero deliveries (no push, no email). Includes a deep-link to the dashboard with the matching filters pre-applied. Only seen by super admins.
emailOptOuts.exhaustionAdminDigestFailedDesc: Daily super-admin alert when the exhaustion admin digest cron fails to deliver to every recipient or every admin email is bouncing, so a stuck digest gets noticed before the backlog grows. Turning this off does not affect other admin alerts or your daily summary.
emailOptOuts.coachingTipClosedDesc: Push notification when you close the gap on a swing-coaching tip your coach assigned. Turning this off keeps every other coaching push (new tip, follow-up reminder) on — it only silences the encouragement nudge.

notificationAudit.heading: Suppressed notifications
notificationAudit.intro: When a notification is silenced before it reaches you — because you muted the alert, or because the system couldn't deliver it (e.g. a bounced email or no registered device) — we record it here so a real outage can't hide forever, even if you've muted every channel.

empty.title: Nothing suppressed in this window.
empty.subtitle: We didn't record any notifications that the system or your settings silenced for you in the last {{days}} days.

errors.signedOut: Sign in to view your suppressed notifications.
errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load your notification audit. Try again.

noLockerDescription: You don't currently have a locker. Join the waitlist to be notified when one becomes available.

commPrefsKey.sectionDescription: Pick how each batchable notification reaches you. Real-time sends right away; Daily summary holds it until the next digest email.
commPrefsKey.digestModePrefix: Your global digest setting is currently
commPrefsKey.digestModeSuffix: . Choices below override it for individual notifications.
commPrefsKey.resetConfirmDescription: This clears every per-notification real-time vs. daily-summary choice you have set. Each notification will go back to following your global digest setting. You can change individual choices again afterwards, but the customisation you have built up here will be gone.

compareModal.title: Compare reels
compareModal.empty: Pick at least two reels to compare.
